title: consumer vpn install-shaped discovery (file, registry, process)
description: highlights recent activity that looks like consumer vpn installs or upgrades: file creates under known vendor paths or temp/downloads with installer-like names, uninstall-registry displayname matches, and noisy installer processes. exploratory only—not proof of first-time install without a baseline.

title: consumer vpn signals across process, file, registry, and software inventory
description: correlates common consumer vpn strings in mde process, file, and registry events with tvm software inventory rows. union uses a unified eventtime and inventory rows use the query run time as a synthetic sort key.
